channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #94 - 2026-04-11
item.description:
🚀 Beehive Industries secures $29.7m US Air Force contract for Frenzy engine family Beehive Industries, a Denver-based manufacturer of additively manufactured jet engines for uncrewed aerial defense systems, has received a $29.7 million contract from the US Air Force to complete vehicle integration,... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Beehive-USAF-contract-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/beehive-industries-secures-29-7m-us-air-force-contract-for-frenzy-engine-family

📰 adidas’ 3D printed soccer cleats have arrived Well, our hunch was correct: sportswear giant adidas has indeed designed a 3D printed soccer cleat (or football boot, depending on where you are in the world). The sports world … The post adidas’ 3D printed soccer cleats have arrived appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/adidas-football-cleat-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/adidas-3d-printed-soccer-cleats-have-arrived

💻 Reinforce3D and 3Dees Industries partner to expand CFIP adoption Reinforce3D, a Spain-based company specializing in Continuous Fiber Injection Process (CFIP) technology, and 3Dees Industries, a Czech provider of additive manufacturing solutions, have entered into a partnership... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Reinforce3D-and-3Dees-partnership-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/reinforce3d-and-3dees-industries-partner-to-expand-cfip-adoption

🖨 MetalWorm takes WAAM to Brazil and Malaysia, one university at a time MetalWorm, a Turkish manufacturer of robotic Wire Arc Additive Manufacturing systems, has successfully deployed two of its machines at academic institutions on opposite sides of the world: the Federal Institute … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-04-09-205245-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/metalworm-takes-waam-to-brazil-and-malaysia-one-university-at-a-time

🖨 LPE expands polymer AM capacity to meet growing demand Laser Prototypes Europe (LPE), a Belfast-based additive manufacturing service provider, has installed a new EOS P396 SLS system to bring its total number of industrial SLS platforms to four. The … The post LPE expands polymer AM capacity to meet growing demand appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/LPE-new-SLS-system-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/lpe-expands-polymer-am-capacity-to-meet-growing-demand

🚀 BigRep to launch ONE.5X and pellet extrusion partnership with Massive Dimension BigRep is bringing two product developments to RAPID + TCT 2026 in Boston: the BigRep ONE.5X, an updated version of its 1-cubic-meter large-format 3D printer, and a co-development partnership with … The post BigRep... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ONE-with-MDXPelletExtruder-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/bigrep-to-launch-one-5x-and-pellet-extrusion-partnership-with-massive-dimension

🚀 Pushing the limits How metal additive manufacturing is enabling Stoke Space to unlock the new space economy. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/4.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/pushing-the-limits

🏠 Application spotlight: 3D printed replacement antenna masts save decades of combined supply wait time A US Marine Corps Lance Corporal redesigns MUOS antenna mast with FDM 3D printing. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/260212-M-UE056-1083-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/3d-printed-replacement-antenna-masts-save-decades-of-combined-supply-wait-time

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #93 - 2026-04-10
item.description:
🔥 „Don't Ban 3D Printers": Initiative aims to mobilize against US regulation of 3D printers - 3Druck.com „Don't Ban 3D Printers": Initiative aims to mobilize against US regulation of 3D printers 3Druck.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing Viral on Apr 08, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

♻️ BigRep’s New One.5X Makes Big Parts Faster & Easier, Plus Introduces Pellet Extrusion - All3DP BigRep’s New One.5X Makes Big Parts Faster & Easier, Plus Introduces Pellet Extrusion All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 09, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxQd21yUDd4V2tCQlVVcFEzMUdNRjRvelRUdjJTZU1nNG5xemhmRldBMGVDVTJNT0h5by1ybDNLalphSXJxallxZEZ6Z2paVUVVcFNaRDBhcEdNUmtBRlNiRmxIQ1JVelZnU2lOa2V5OVg1TUpFYWJJVnh0UlpUcTd5QldDWFFoZGloWHlJOXNLeUdzVUpsR1RXUk8tRzVZTjFOMU9Wbk9B?oc=5

🚀 INNOSPACE becomes first in South Korea to commercialize support-free titanium 3D printing INNOSPACE, a South Korean satellite launch service company, has become the first in the country to commercialize a metal additive manufacturing process that produces high-precision titanium components without support... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/INNOSPACE-Support-Free-Titanium-AM-Tech-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/innospace-becomes-first-in-south-korea-to-commercialize-support-free-titanium-3d-printing

💻 ValCUN’s 3D printed catalytic air purifier reduces emissions and costs Poor air quality from industrial emissions has a significant impact on public health, leading to problems like strokes, heart disease, and respiratory conditions. For this reason, efforts are being made … The post ValCUN’s 3D printed catalytic air purifier reduces emissions and costs appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Air-purification-ValCUN-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/valcuns-3d-printed-catalytic-air-purifier-reduces-emissions-and-costs

🚀 GEFERTEC launches arc10X WAAM system for research & series production The system’s maximum printable build volume has an edge length of 1.2 meters and supports component weights of up to 750 kilograms. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/01-Heroshot-mit-Fugen_Alpha_gruen--1-.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/gefertec-launches-arc10x-waam-system-for-research-series-production

🚀 AMT & GreatAmerica launch all-inclusive payment program for PostPro SFX Vapor Smoothing system The system can now be purchased in North America for a single monthly payment of 999 USD. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/AMTSFX.jpeg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/amt-greatamerica-launch-all-inclusive-payment-program-for-postpro-sfx-vapor-smoothing-system

🚀 BigRep launches ONE.5X 1-metre-cubed 3D printing system ahead of RAPID + TCT The company has also established a co-development partnership with Massive Dimension that brings pellet-based extrusion to the BigRep platform for the first time. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 09, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/ONE5x_Wide_PrintingTPU-Mixer_1-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/bigrep-launches-one-5x-1-metre-cubed-3d-printing-system-ahead-of-rapid-tct

🚀 SHINING 3D expands all-in-one scanning series with EinScan Rigil Lite launch SHINING 3D, a leading developer of 3D scanning and metrology technology, has launched the EinScan Rigil Lite as a cost-effective addition to its Rigil Series of all-in-one 3D scanners. Designed … The post SHINING 3D expands all-in-one scanning series with EinScan Rigil Lite launch appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Shining-3D-Rigil-Lite-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3d-expands-all-in-one-scanning-series-with-einscan-rigil-lite-launch

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #92 - 2026-04-09
item.description:
🔥 New Site Warns Of Sweeping 3D Printer Laws A new advocacy site argues proposed “anti gun” bills could unintentionally criminalize everyday 3D printers and software. The post New Site Warns Of Sweeping 3D Printer Laws appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/new-site-warns-of-sweeping-3d-printer-laws

🖨 Elmet Technologies receives US patent for refractory metal additive manufacturing process Elmet Technologies, a fully integrated, US-owned and operated tungsten and molybdenum manufacturer, has received US Patent (no. 12,571,080) for the “Fabrication of Metallic Parts by Additive Manufacturing”, reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Elmet-Technologies-refractory-metals-patent-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/elmet-technologies-receives-us-patent-for-refractory-metal-additive-manufacturing-process

💻 Stratasys announces new polymer 3D printing materials ahead of RAPID + TCT The company has also introduced a new Measurement-Based Warped Modeling software to GrabCAD Print Pro. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Untitled-design--32-.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/stratasys-announces-new-polymer-3d-printing-materials-ahead-of-rapid-tct

💻 FABULOUS and AMT validate workflow for 3D printing food-safe parts In the food industry, regulatory compliance is essential and any lapses can have real consequences when it comes to food-borne illnesses. A central part of this compliance is related to … The post FABULOUS and AMT validate workflow for 3D printing food-safe parts appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Ice-extruder-Detect-vapor-smoothed-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/fabulous-and-amt-validate-workflow-for-3d-printing-food-safe-parts

🖨 Elmet Technologies granted US patent for 'Fabrication of Metallic parts by Additive Manufacturing' technology The patent further strengthens Elmet Technologies’ growing portfolio of IP in powders and processes for AM and powder metallurgy applications. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Untitled-design--31-.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/elmet-technologies-granted-us-patent-for-fabrication-of-metallic-parts-by-additive-manufacturing-technology

🖨 LPE installs EOS P396 3D printer in response to 'surging demand' for 3D printed parts The new EOS P396 represents LPE's fourth industrial SLS system. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/System_EOS_P_396_Front_noBg_shadow.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/lpe-installs-eos-p396-3d-printer-in-response-to-surging-demand-for-3d-printed-parts

🖨 Poly Precision Technology joins ROBOZE Advanced Manufacturing network PPT is set to use ROBOZE's additive manufacturing technologies to deliver high-performance components designed to replace metal in demanding applications. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/112245692.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/poly-precision-technology-joins-roboze-advanced-manufacturing-network

🏠 6K Additive breaks ground on HQ and manufacturing campus expansion 6K is adding alloy warehousing, ingot production, and pre- and post-processing production capacity. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Groundbreaking.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/6k-additive-breaks-ground-on-hq-and-manufacturing-campus-expansion

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #91 - 2026-04-08
item.description:
♻️ Patent Proposes Recycling Thermoset Polymers Into 3D Printing Filaments You may soon be 3D printing thermoset filament. The post Patent Proposes Recycling Thermoset Polymers Into 3D Printing Filaments appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/patent-proposes-recycling-thermoset-polymers-into-3d-printing-filaments

🖨 Artec Jet LiDAR scanner can digitize entire sites via drone or handheld Artec 3D, a 3D scanning technology company based in Luxembourg, has released Artec Jet, a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM)-based LiDAR scanner designed for large-scale 3D data capture across demanding …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 07, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Artec-3D-Jet-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/artec-jet-lidar-scanner-can-digitize-entire-sites-via-drone-or-handheld

🖨 Otsuka Chemical introduces Poticon potassium titanate fiber reinforced filament Otsuka Chemical, a Japanese specialty chemicals manufacturer, developed Poticon—a filament for material extrusion 3D printing based on a composite of thermoplastic resin reinforced with ultra-fine potassium titanate... The material … The post Otsuka Chemical introduces Poticon potassium titanate fiber reinforced filament appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/POTICON_filament2-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/otsuka-chemicals-poticon-filament-brings-potassium-titanate-fiber-reinforcement-to-mex-3d-printing

🚀 MX3D completes EU-backed PIONEER project for hybrid steel AM PIONEER, a project funded by the EU’s Horizon Europe program and spearheaded by a 17-partner consortium, has successfully concluded. The project launched in 2023 with the broad goal of building … The post MX3D completes EU-backed PIONEER project for hybrid steel AM appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/mx3d-pioneer-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/mx3d-completes-eu-backed-pioneer-project-for-hybrid-steel-am

🚀 BMF introduces BMF Clear transparent photopolymer resin The material has been engineered for applications requiring exceptional light transmission and micron-level accuracy. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 07, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Image-1-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/bmf-introduces-bmf-clear-transparent-photopolymer-resin

📰 Nano Dimension sells Additively Manufactured Electronics & Fabrica product lines Inspira Technologies will acquire both product lines for $12.5 million. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 07, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/DragonFly-IV-Inside-View-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/nano-dimension-sells-additively-manufactured-electronics-fabrica-product-lines

🖨 BLT metal 3D printing tech again leveraged for OPPO's latest foldable smartphone BLT is able to additively manufacture the hinge system as a single structure. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 07, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/OPPO-BLT-1-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/blt-metal-3d-printing-tech-again-leveraged-for-oppos-latest-foldable-smartphone

🦺 Lincotek names Gianluca Fioravanti as Global General Manager of Medical Division Lincotek, a global additive manufacturing solutions provider, has named Gianluca Fioravanti as Global General Manager of its Medical Division. Fioravanti will report directly to Group CEO Andrea Colombo, and will … The post Lincotek names Gianluca Fioravanti as Global General Manager of Medical Division appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Lincotek-Gianluca-Fioravanti-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/lincotek-names-gianluca-fioravanti-as-global-general-manager-of-its-medical-division

item.description:

♻️ 6K Wins $1.95M DLA Award to Recycle Defense Metals 6K will receive $1.95 million from the Defense Logistics Agency under the Recovering Strategic Value project. The Phase II award aims to reduce the US’ dependence on Nickel, Titanium, Tungsten,, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 06, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325011/6k-wins-1-95m-dla-award-to-recycle-defense-metals

📰 Caracol produces mold-free robotic LFAM sports car roof Caracol, a global leader in advanced robotic technologies, has produced a full-size sports car roof using its Heron additive manufacturing robotic platform, eliminating the need for traditional molds and cutting …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 06, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Caracol-LFAM-Sports-Car-Roof-05-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/caracol-produces-mold-free-robotic-lfam-sports-car-roof

📰 Machine learning model designs rust-resistant, ultra-high strength steel for 3D printing A research team from the University of South China and Purdue University has developed a new class of ultra-high strength, high-ductility steel for 3D printing using an interpretable machine learning … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 06, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/High-strength-3D-printing-steel-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/machine-learning-model-designs-rust-resistant-ultra-high-strength-steel-for-3d-printing

🖨 6K Additive to convert domestic scrap into metal 3D printing powders via Defense Logistics Agency contract The contract will run for an 18-month term and focus on Nickel, Titanium, Tungsten, and Niobium materials. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 06, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/04/6K---UniMelt-high-quality-image_Re-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/6k-additive-to-convert-domestic-scrap-into-metal-3d-printing-powders-via-defense-logistics-agency-contract

🦺 How a collaboration between KLS Martin and Lithoz led to hundreds of patient-specific ceramic implants The origin story of KLS Martin’s ceramic additive manufacturing program begins in a Viennese pizzeria. It was there, over 12 years ago, that Frank Reinauer, Mechanical Engineer at KLS Martin, … The post How a collaboration between KLS Martin and Lithoz led to hundreds of patient-specific ceramic implants appeared, reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 06, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/HA480_TLIF_zygomatic_implant_DSC00077-2-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/how-a-collaboration-between-kls-martin-and-lithoz-led-to-hundreds-of-patient-specific-ceramic-implants

Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 06, 2026. Image ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/content/images/2026/03/Building-the-Manufacturing-Workforce-Pipeline-Through-Research-and-Industry-Collaboration--4-.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/rapid-tct-conference-q-a-huba-horompoly-gravity-pull-systems-maximising-profit-in-am

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #89 - 2026-04-06
item.description:
📰 Robotic 3D printing meets automotive design in Škoda’s light wall Fungamental, a Czech studio specializing in robotic 3D printing, designed and produced a lighting installation for the Škoda Auto headquarters. The wall, composed of fifty front headlights from the Škoda … The post Robotic 3D printing meets automotive design in Škoda’s light wall appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-04-04-173748-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/robotic-3d-printing-meets-automotive-design-in-skodas-light-wall

🏠 IIT Guwahati and Canadian researchers develop framework for seismic-resistant 3D printed concrete housing Researchers at the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Guwahati, working within a broader Canada-India research program, have developed a framework for designing earthquake-resistant 3D printed concrete (3DPC)... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 05, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/IIT-Guwahati-earthquake-concrete-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/iit-guwahati-and-canadian-researchers-develop-framework-for-seismic-resistant-3d-printed-concrete-housing

📰 Stratasys Direct selected for U.S. Department of War’s JAMA IV pilot program Stratasys Direct, the parts-on-demand contract manufacturing division of the Israeli-American company Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ: SSYS), was selected to participate in the U.S, reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 05, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Airbus_A400M-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/stratasys-direct-selected-for-u-s-department-of-wars-jama-iv-pilot-program

💻 Charles Darwin University leads on $1.2 million robotic road repair system Charles Darwin University (CDU), Civiltech Solutions, and the Additive Manufacturing Cooperative Research Centre (AMCRC) have formed a AUD $1.2 million (US $0.83m) industry-research partnership, to develop a robotic... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 05, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/CDU-robotic-road-repairs-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/charles-darwin-university-leads-on-1-2-million-robotic-road-repair-system

🦺 3D Printing Prosthetic Nests to Help Endangered Birds Stretch Their Wings On the grounds of Blenheim Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site near Oxford, England surrounded by roughly 12,000 acres of forest and gardens, researchers from Australia and the UK are... Reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 05, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325034/3d-printing-prosthetic-nests-to-help-endangered-birds-stretch-their-wings

📰 MIT experts come up with solution for a well-known 3D-printing fumble - Digital Trends MIT experts come up with solution for a well-known 3D-printing fumble Digital Trends Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 05, 2026. The project will run over, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 03, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325004/canada-backs-aspect-biosystems-with-280m-to-scale-bioprinted-tissue-therapies
